channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dead cat, 29th April
item.description:
Dead cat on grass bank (opposite chicken shop)

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 34, Leith Hill, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: All white lines are slightly faded on site., 29th April
item.description:
All white lines are slightly faded on site.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 191, Southwark Park Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: No 39 nelson road n9 rubbish all over Wellington ave and in the car park, 29th April
item.description:
Rubbish from no 39 Nelson Road n9 0rh is all over Wellington ave and also in the private car park. Fly tipping taken to the extreme. Not acceptable. Council needs to take appropriate action as im not paying my council tax for no reason

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Nelson Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Death tree on the south side of the road, 29th April
item.description:
This tree has been death for some time now. Can I kindly ask that the council replaces it with a new tree? Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dynevor Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Metal square mesh panel about 1 Sq.m from the Tramlink / 3rd rail railway line swinging loose and dangerously across the narrow public footway in Rectory Rd, Beckenham., 29th April
item.description:
Metal square mesh panel about 1 Sq.m from the Tramlink / 3rd rail railway line swinging loose and dangerously across the narrow public footway in Rectory Rd, Beckenham. The absence of the metal panel allows dangerous access to the railway for children, adults and pets. Please instruct the relevant rail authority to repair the metal urgently.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rectory Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: White pen tag on green telecomms cabinet fronting Oakbrook flats, Court Downs Road, Beckenham, 29th April
item.description:
White pen tag on green telecomms cabinet fronting Oakbrook flats, Court Downs Road, Beckenham.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Court Downs Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rail/tram brick bridge parapet by public footpath from Thayers Farm Rd to King's Hall Rd (about 10 metres from Thayers Farm Road) has about 3 sq.m of spray tagging on it., 29th April
item.description:
Rail/tram brick bridge parapet by public footpath from Thayers Farm Rd to King's Hall Rd (about 10 metres from Thayers Farm Road) has about 3 sq.m of spray tagging on it. Access may be required from Barnmead Rd Allotments.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Thayers Farm Road, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car (cars) causing traffic problems at busy junction, 29th April
item.description:
Car (s) have been parked during yellow line restriction hours causing traffic problems at this busy junction for many months. Numerous PCNs have been observed & do not seem to be a deterrent. This issue needs to be resolved as this has been ongoing for many months.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hatherley Crescent, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly Tipping on Ossory Road, 29th April
item.description:
Items have been dumped along the pavement and grass bank near Asda, not sure who by but the items are a few chairs and general rubbish.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ossory Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Central refuge bollard concrete base damaged and 'pass on the left' illuminated (?) bollard leaning in Blakeney Rd at the T junction with Bridge Road, Beckenham., 29th April
item.description:
Central refuge bollard concrete base damaged and 'pass on the left' illuminated (?) bollard leaning in Blakeney Rd at the T junction with Bridge Road, Beckenham.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Blakeney Road, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Adjoining Warwick Court 47, Park Hill Road, Shortlands, on the Bromley Road narrow footway frontage are two dumped sprung mattresses - just the metal parts., 29th April
item.description:
Adjoining Warwick Court 47, Park Hill Road, Shortlands, on the Bromley Road narrow footway frontage are two dumped sprung mattresses - just the metal parts. This has been there Tue 28th and Wed 29th April 2026
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bromley Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fronting Mays Hill Lodge or Clive House, Mays Hill Rd, Shortlands, today's strong winds appear to have broken a tree bough from a residential garden which is now blocking the public footway., 29th April
item.description:
Fronting Mays Hill Lodge or Clive House, Mays Hill Rd, Shortlands, today's strong winds appear to have broken a tree bough from a residential garden which is now blocking the public footway. The leafy tree bough is about 2.5m long x 2m wide x 1m high. The thickest branch may have a diameter of about 5cm. Please clear the bough for the pedestrian public, blind persons, people with motorised scooters etc. to use the footway again.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): May's Hill Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 18-20 Glengall Rd, 29th April
item.description:
Random furniture dumped outside these two houses

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Glengall Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Tree fallen, 29th April
item.description:
Caller reports a fallen tree may have hit a car and has covered the pathway and partially over the road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 54, Leesons Hill, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Green lawn requires mowing, 29th April
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hillcrest Road, Sundridge, Greater London

item.title: Blocked Emergency access double yellow blips, 29th April
item.description:
Blocking driveway 4 garage cannot gain access.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kyverdale Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fronting 126 Bromley Rd, Beckenham on a footway build out near St Christopher's Primary School, a thin 1 metre long vertical warning strip has broken and is lying on the footway., 29th April
item.description:
Fronting 126 Bromley Rd, Beckenham on a footway build out near St Christopher's Primary School, a thin 1 metre long vertical warning strip has broken and is lying on the footway. This is different as a seeming flexible bollard unlike the solid bollards at the kerb build out. Please repair or replace this thin warning board.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 49, Bromley Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wooden bollard uprooted in grass verge in Thayers Farm Road, about 3m from the junction with Beckenham Rd, Beckenham., 29th April
item.description:
Wooden bollard uprooted in grass verge in Thayers Farm Road, about 3m from the junction with Beckenham Rd, Beckenham. This is by the vehicle entrance to Hermes House flats, but is a council verge which this, of about 3 wooden boards would appear to be protecting from vehicles driving and parking on the verge at this road junction
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Thayers Farm Road, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Faded parking bays., 29th April
item.description:
On Glebe Road, at the play and display side of the road the lines are completely faded. The problem is that people are parking using part of a second spot, making less parking spots for an already very problematic parking area. It just need to be painted again.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Glebe Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped in Hendre Road, 29th April
item.description:
Rubbish accumulating by a bin in Hendre Road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Old Kent Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
